## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content planning, and progress updates.](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEMrush data can be misleading; Google Search Console (GSC) is the most accurate source for traffic and ranking data](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Focus on answering service content cluster with 25-30 new articles in the next 1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Enterprise-focused content strategy to be developed, considering current site visitors from business productivity database](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Expect initial impressions by March 15th and significant clicks by end of March](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Topics

### SEMrush Data Accuracy Concerns

  - [SEMrush significantly overestimated traffic (5k/month vs. 18 clicks in 3 months in GSC)](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Recent changes in JavaScript rendering affecting third-party tool accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Team to educate clients on using GSC as the primary source of truth for traffic and ranking data](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [Approved categories: appointment scheduling software, best AI tools, answering services](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Total of 1,400 potential topics with 5,000+ search volume across categories](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Prioritizing answering service content bucket (35 topics, 4,000 search volume, avg. KD 15)](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Considering enterprise-focused content to align with upmarket shift (3,000 employees, X million ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Content Production and Timeline

  - [Aim for 25-30 articles on answering services in the next 1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Updating 10 existing articles in the current database](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Expect initial impressions by March 15th, significant clicks by end of March](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

### Website Architecture and Navigation

  - [Potential for "Resources" dropdown in main navigation to house content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Consider mirroring enterprise solutions structure similar to competitors (e.g., Dialpad)](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
  - [Team to provide recommendations on new template structures for content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)

### Reporting and Tracking

  - [Weekly call updates on performance metrics (clicks, impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Airtable to track live pages and their performance](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Team to provide a recap with key dates and deliverables for executive review](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to implement appointment language changes and publish updated articles](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Daniel to share export of enterprise visitors from Apollo for content strategy insights](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up in Slack thread regarding SEMrush data details for Bob](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2679.0)
  - [Team to send meeting recap with recording, notes, and key deliverable dates](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2506.0)
  - [Andrej and Prateek to discuss potential new template structures for content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [Daniel to prepare for potential CMS duplication or updates based on team recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/7-4aGL9rYagpA9sqM2CuNcZJJSPMs3y9?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)
